articles.title: iOS 27: Public beta may launch this week, plus the newest AI features for the iPhone update - Yahoo Tech

articles.content: We got to see a detailed preview of what iOS 27 will bring to Apple devices later this year at WWDC 2026. Now, the public betas will reportedly be launching sometime this week, marking the first time… [+6818 chars]
